assert_ValidAttemptBounds.message: Assertion failed: ValidAttemptBounds — attempt >= 1 /\ attempt <= MaxRetries + 1

assert_PermanentFailConsistent.message: Assertion failed: PermanentFailConsistent — permanent => (verdict = "FAIL" /\ lastAttemptMade = MaxRetries)
assert_PermanentFailConsistent.description: Test assertion for PermanentFailConsistent from RetriesExhausted spec

assert_CorrectionCountConsistent.message: Assertion failed: CorrectionCountConsistent — permanent => correctionCount = MaxRetries - 1
assert_CorrectionCountConsistent.description: Test assertion for CorrectionCountConsistent from RetriesExhausted spec

assert_SummaryCorrectWhenPermanent.condition:
permanent implies
        (summaryStatus    = "fail"
         and stuckOn       = "coverage"
         and findingsPreserved = TRUE)
assert_SummaryCorrectWhenPermanent.message:
Assertion failed: SummaryCorrectWhenPermanent — permanent =>
        (summaryStatus    = "fail"
         /\ stuckOn       = "coverage"
         /\ findingsPreserved ...
assert_SummaryCorrectWhenPermanent.description: Test assertion for SummaryCorrectWhenPermanent from RetriesExhausted spec

assert_BlockedPassesDistinctFromFailed.message: Assertion failed: BlockedPassesDistinctFromFailed — \A p \in blockedPasses : p # "coverage"
assert_BlockedPassesDistinctFromFailed.description: Test assertion for BlockedPassesDistinctFromFailed from RetriesExhausted spec

assert_FindingsPreservedMonotone.message:
Assertion failed: FindingsPreservedMonotone — findingsPreserved = TRUE =>
        (summaryStatus = "fail" \/ summaryStatus = "none")
assert_FindingsPreservedMonotone.description: Test assertion for FindingsPreservedMonotone from RetriesExhausted spec

test_scenarios.expected_outcome: DependentsBlockedWhenPermanent should hold but was violated at state 1
